context: Tests whether the AlarmKit skill guides state synchronization and lifecycle operations accurately.

checklist.name: Throwing alarms getter
checklist.description: States that AlarmManager.shared.alarms is a throwing getter and examples handle it with try, do/catch, or error propagation.

checklist.name: Updates as synchronization
checklist.description: Uses alarmUpdates or an equivalent synchronization flow to keep app UI aligned with AlarmKit state rather than treating a launch snapshot as permanent source of truth.

checklist.name: State-gated operations
checklist.description: Explains that AlarmKit lifecycle operations throw for invalid states and should be gated by current Alarm.State instead of assuming invalid calls are ignored.

checklist.name: Pause state
checklist.description: Identifies pause(id:) as valid for alarms in countdown state.

checklist.name: Resume state
checklist.description: Identifies resume(id:) as valid for alarms in paused state.

checklist.name: Countdown state
checklist.description: Identifies countdown(id:) as valid for alerting alarms, such as moving an alert into its post-alert countdown path.

checklist.name: Stop semantics
checklist.description: Explains that stop(id:) removes one-shot alarms but repeating alarms are scheduled again for their next occurrence.

checklist.name: Cancel semantics
checklist.description: Explains that cancel(id:) removes an alarm completely, including repeating alarms.

checklist.name: Missing update interpretation
checklist.description: Avoids claiming that a missing alarm from alarmUpdates proves user cancellation; frames it as no longer scheduled with AlarmKit unless reconciled against app-persisted IDs or intent.
